message.content:
Explore the exam-server project structure at D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams-system\exam-server. I need to understand:
1. What framework it uses (Spring Boot? what version?)
2. The project structure (main packages, modules)
3. How controllers/APIs are organized
4. Any existing markdown or document-related functionality
5. The pom.xml or build.gradle configuration
6. How the server is configured (application.yml/properties)

Use Glob to find key files like pom.xml, build.gradle, application.yml, and controller files. Read the main config files and a few controllers to understand patterns. Be thorough - read at least pom.xml and the main application config.
